notes: Mayo Central Hospital operates under strict HIPAA and GDPR compliance (R2: Compliance Officer for any PHI/PII; R3: Medical Director for critical patient safety decisions; R5: dual CFO+Administrator for large investments). External signals should emphasize HIPAA/OCR enforcement guidance, PHI breach notification requirements, CMS clinical technology standards, and patient safety benchmarks. Strategic goal G2 (Regulatory and Data Compliance: zero unauthorized PHI disclosures) is the highest-sensitivity governance area.
